text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp season has come around again!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hey, Dia. Do you have a second?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: What's up?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well... Do you remember what I said at the
Takarazuka Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
About how everyone is expecting great things
from me?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was thinking about the kind of
expectations they might have.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: And... I've made up my mind!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
If people see themselves in me, then I'm going to
keep running without giving up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure they all believe that I can rise from rock
bottom and claw my way back up to the top!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
My pluck, refusal to ever give up, and tenacity to
stick through things until the very end is what
makes me me, after all!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe! That's exactly who you are!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Which is why I'm aiming for a clean sweep in the
autumn Tenno Sho, Japan Cup, and Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm going to beat both Teio and McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I know just how strong they are since I've looked
up to them since forever. I know just how difficult
it's gonna be...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But that's exactly why I want to beat them! I want
to rise higher than the people I look up to!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I have to surpass my idols in order to make up for
letting everyone down at the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
My goal is the same as yours. I'm aiming to
outshine those I admire too.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: And I won't lose to you either!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Good! Let's both give it our all! Anyway, I'll see
you later!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Good for you, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, by the way, Trainer, I have something to
discuss with you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's in regards to our future plans. You see, I was
hoping to work on increasing my strength so I'm
able to handle myself in a variety of situations.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I went to watch one of McQueen's races the other
day for research purposes.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Her legs are strong enough to deal with even soft
ground conditions. The power of her strides left a
significant impression on me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I believe having such power would make it easier
for me to break away from the pack in my races.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Or rather, I realized that if I want to stand a chance against McQueen and Teio, I need to gain the strength I'm currently lacking.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to squander the opportunity they
offered me. I want to face their challenge in peak
condition and win!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Of course, this is also in preparation for the
future, as I'd like to be an illustrious runner
competing overseas someday!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember how the possibility of her running on
the international stage was raised back at the
New Year's party.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll certainly need strength to run on the
difficult tracks she'll face abroad.
choice_data_list: Why do you want to run internationally?
Why do you want to run internationally?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I haven't decided for sure yet, but... Do you
remember that we spoke about what my running
could give to people the other day?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You mentioned you saw the power of possibility
in me, and that made me realize something.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Umamusume community has
constantly been thwarted at France's traditional
and prestigious races...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But as the one who managed to break the Satono
family's jinx, if I win one of those races, I believe I
can show people how it's always possible to make
history.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And to do that, I thought it prudent to set my
sights on the international stage early.
choice_data_list: I see. Let's do it, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as she says, the stronger she becomes, the
more adaptable she'll be in different scenarios. I
see no reason to refuse her request.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to make things so difficult, but thank you
for agreeing to help me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I must master a powerful new running style... I
must!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If I can't do that, I'll never be able to beat
McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a battle against her idol on the horizon and
a clear vision for her next goal, Satono Diamond
is absolutely brimming with enthusiasm.
